SELECT event_date, toYear(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE toYear(event_date) > 2000;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS year_count, toYear(event_date) FROM test_dates GROUP BY toYear(event_date);
SELECT t.event_date, toYear(t.event_date) AS year, o.another_event_date FROM test_dates t JOIN other_dates o ON toYear(t.event_date) = toYear(o.another_event_date);
SELECT toYear(min(event_date)) AS min_year, toYear(max(event_date)) AS max_year FROM test_dates;
